mapper.select:
SELECT sales.memberId, m.name AS memberName, m.email AS email, m.partner_status AS partnerStatus, sales.totalSales, sales.completedItemCount FROM ( SELECT TRIM(o.id) AS memberId, COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * IFNULL(oi.quantity, 1)), 0) AS totalSales, COUNT(oi.item_id) AS completedItemCount FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.oid = o.oid WHERE oi.order_status IN ('배송완료', '교환완료') AND o.id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(o.id) != '' GROUP BY TRIM(o.id) HAVING COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * IFNULL(oi.quantity, 1)), 0) > 0 ) sales LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = sales.memberId
( sales.memberId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY sales.totalSales DESC
